mapper.select:
/** UsptBsnsPblancDao.selectList */ select ubp.pblanc_id , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.rcept_bgnde , ubp.rcept_endde , ubp.pblanc_day , ub.bsns_year , ub.bsns_cd , ub.bsns_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@PS_CODE_GROUP}', ubp.pblanc_sttus_cd) as pblanc_sttus , case when ubp.ntce=true then '게시중' else '게시안함' end as ntce , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' else '정시모집' end as ordtm_rcrit , row_number() over (order by ubp.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} left outer join ( select bsns_cd , job_step_cd from uspt_bsns_job_step where job_step_cd = 'EVL_SLCTN' ) js on js.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsPblancDao.selectListCount */ select count(ubp.pblanc_id) as cnt from uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} left outer join ( select bsns_cd , job_step_cd from uspt_bsns_job_step where job_step_cd = 'EVL_SLCTN' ) js on js.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd

/** UsptBsnsPblancDao.select */ select ubp.pblanc_id , ubp.bsns_cd , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.pblanc_no , ubp.ordtm_rcrit , ubp.pblanc_day , ubp.bsns_bgnde , ubp.bsns_endde , ubp.bsns_scale , ubp.slctn_scale , ubp.pblanc_sumry , ubp.rcept_bgnde , ubp.rcept_endde , ubp.rcept_closing_hm , ubp.pblanc_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@PS_CODE_GROUP}', ubp.pblanc_sttus_cd) as pblanc_sttus , ubp.ntce , case when ubp.ntce = true then '게시중' else '게시안함' end as ntceNm , ubp.rdcnt , ubp.enabled , ubp.attachment_group_id , ubp.thumbnail_file_id , ubp.creator_id , ubp.created_dt , ubp.updater_id , ubp.updated_dt , ub.bsns_year , ub.bsns_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@TASK_CODE_GROUP}', ub.task_type_cd) as task_type_nm , (select max(rcept_odr) from uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept where pblanc_id = ubp.pblanc_id group by pblanc_id ) as rcept_odr , ubc.charger_author_cd from uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} where ubp.pblanc_id = #{pblancId} and ubp.enabled = true

/** UsptBsnsPblancDao.selectPblancApplcntCount */ select count(ubp.pblanc_id) from uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubp.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr where ubp.pblanc_id = #{pblancId}

/** UsptBsnsPblancDao.selectFront */ select sub.* , ci.member_id , ci.member_nm , ci.position_nm , ci.enc_email , ci.enc_tel_no from ( select ubp.pblanc_id , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.pblanc_no , ubp.pblanc_day , ubp.pblanc_sumry , ubp.bsns_scale , ubp.slctn_scale , ubp.ordtm_rcrit , ubp.attachment_group_id , ubp.thumbnail_file_id , ubp.pblanc_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@PS_CODE_GROUP}', ubp.pblanc_sttus_cd) as pblanc_sttus , (ubp.rcept_endde::date - to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd')::date) as rmndr_day , ubp.bsns_bgnde , ubp.bsns_endde , concat(to_char(to_date(ubp.bsns_bgnde ,'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd' ) , ' ~ ' , to_char(to_date(ubp.bsns_endde ,'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd' )) as bsns_pd , concat(to_char(to_date(ubp.rcept_bgnde,'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd' ) , ' ~ ' , to_char(to_date(ubp.rcept_endde,'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd' )) as rcept_pd , ubp.rcept_closing_hm , ub.chrg_dept_nm , ub.bsns_cd , (select max(rcept_odr) from uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept where pblanc_id = ubp.pblanc_id group by pblanc_id ) as rcept_odr , array_to_string(array_agg(distinct fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_CODE_GROUP}', ubrc.recomend_cl_cd)), ',') as recomend_cl , array_to_string(array_agg(distinct fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_CODE_GROUP}', ubamt.apply_mber_type_cd)), ',') as apply_mber_type from uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_recomend_cl ubrc on ubrc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubrc.recomend_cl_type_cd = 'BSR' inner join uspt_bsns_apply_mber_type ubamt on ubamt.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd where ubp.pblanc_id = #{pblancId} group by ubp.pblanc_id, ub.bsns_cd ) sub inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = sub.bsns_cd and ubc.reprsnt_charger = true and ubc.charger_author_cd = 'WRITE' inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ubc.insider_id

/** UsptBsnsPblancDao.selectApplyMberType */ select array_to_string(array_agg(distinct ubamt.apply_mber_type_cd), ',') as mber_type_cd , array_to_string(array_agg(distinct fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MEMBER_TYPE', ubamt.apply_mber_type_cd)), ',') as mber_type from uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_apply_mber_type ubamt on ubamt.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd where ubp.pblanc_id = #{pblancId} group by ubp.pblanc_id

/** UsptBsnsPblancDao.selectFrontMainPopularList */ select sub.* , row_number() over (order by sub.rmndr_day, sub.rdcnt desc, sub.pblanc_day desc) as rn from ( select ubp.pblanc_id , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.rdcnt , ubp.pblanc_day , (ubp.rcept_endde::date - to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd')::date) as rmndr_day , concat(to_char(to_date(ubp.rcept_bgnde,'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd' ) , ' ~ ' , to_char(to_date(ubp.rcept_endde,'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd' ) , ' ' , ubp.rcept_closing_hm, ':00' ) as rcept_pd , array_to_string(array_agg(distinct fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_CODE_GROUP}', ubrc.recomend_cl_cd)), ',') as recomend_cl from uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd left outer join uspt_bsns_recomend_cl ubrc on ubrc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubrc.recomend_cl_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_BSR}' where ubp.enabled = true and ubp.ntce = true and ubp.pblanc_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@PS_ING_CODE}' and ubp.rcept_endde >= to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') group by ubp.pblanc_id ) sub order by sub.rmndr_day, sub.rdcnt desc, sub.pblanc_day desc limit 4
